entries.standalone_probe_detail: standalone coarse serialize-only probe is implemented and currently passes for tree_sitter_c_json; the checked-in parser boundary probe records serialized_state_count=2336 and blocked=false while keeping full lookahead-sensitive parser proof out of the routine boundary
entries.rationale: the next named proof step for tree_sitter_c_json is serialize_only; it remains scoped to standalone_probe because the routine compatibility refresh should stay fast and stable while this deferred parser-wave singleton is evaluated more narrowly, and the current standalone proof is intentionally coarse rather than a full lookahead-sensitive parser promotion
